docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT TULL WILLIAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SMITH KIPPLING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
